SAP Security Patch Day - July 2026
This post shares the information on security notes that remediate vulnerabilities discovered in SAP products. SAP strongly recommends that the customer visits the
support portal
and applies patches on priority to protect their SAP landscape.
On 14
th
of July 2026, SAP security patch day saw the release of 16 new security notes and 1 Github security advisory. There are 3 updates to previously released security notes.

To know more about the security researchers and research companies who have contributed for security patches of this month, visit
here
.
SAP is committed to delivering trustworthy products and cloud services. Secure configuration is essential to ensuring secure operation and data integrity. We have therefore documented security recommendations that are consolidated in
this document
to help you configure the best security for your SAP portfolio.
Archived blogs from previous years are available
here
.
If you have any comments or feedback about this post, you can write to
secure@sap.com
.
